tool_args.label: Cashless Tolling Benefits
tool_args.raw_text: The uninterrupted flow of traffic resulting from cashless tolling continued to yield sustained improvements in travel times for drivers across the agency's tolling areas.

payload.claim_text: The uninterrupted flow of traffic resulting from cashless tolling continued to yield sustained improvements in travel times for drivers across the agency's tolling areas. The reduced congestion in a cashless tolling environment has benefited stakeholders throughout the travel region, leading to overall improvements in safety at crossings and a reduction in motorists' idling time, thereby saving energy and reducing carbon emissions.
payload.subject: cashless tolling

tool_args.label: 2021 Major Reconstruction Projects
tool_args.raw_text: B&T performed several customer-facing reconstruction projects in 2021 including: a full deck replacement of the main span of the Throgs Neck bridge... a full deck rehabilitation of the upper-level approaches and upper-level anchorage spans at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge... and the completion of the Upper and Lower Level Toll Plazas and Southbound Approach at the Henry Hudson Bridge and lighting replacement at NB/SB Henry Hudson Parkway.

payload.claim_text: B&T performed several customer-facing reconstruction projects in 2021 including: a full deck replacement of the main span of the Throgs Neck bridge, including a new drainage system, fire standpipe, and lighting systems; a full deck rehabilitation of the upper-level approaches and upper-level anchorage spans at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge including drainage, fire standpipes, and lighting systems; and the completion of the Upper and Lower Level Toll Plazas and Southbound Approach at the Henry Hudson Bridge and lighting replacement at NB/SB Henry Hudson Parkway.
payload.subject: MTA Bridges and Tunnels reconstruction projects

tool_args.label: 2021 Overtime Savings
tool_args.raw_text: Actual Overtime spending in 2021 were estimated at $23.3 million in the Adopted Budget, and actual costs came in at $14.8 million, which was 36.5% lower due to scheduling, deployment, and managerial efficiencies.

payload.claim_text: Actual Overtime spending in 2021 were estimated at $23.3 million in the Adopted Budget, and actual costs came in at $14.8 million, which was 36.5% lower due to scheduling, deployment, and managerial efficiencies.
payload.subject: MTA Bridges and Tunnels overtime

tool_args.label: TollsNY App Milestones
tool_args.raw_text: 2021 was the first full year of the TollsNY smartphone app... As of year-end, there were more than 1.4 million installations, and the TollsNY app is maintaining a 4.8 rating in the iOS app store.

payload.claim_text: 2021 was the first full year of the TollsNY smartphone app, highlighting the functionality available to E-ZPass and Tolls by Mail customers to manage their accounts. The TollsNY app won multiple industry awards in 2021, including IBTTA's President's Award and Toll Excellence Customer Service Award. As of year-end, there were more than 1.4 million installations, and the TollsNY app is maintaining a 4.8 rating in the iOS app store.
payload.subject: TollsNY app
